name: Veal Scallopini
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the veal cubes with flour mixed with salt and pepper.
2. Fry the seasoned veal in oil until browned.
3. Place the fried veal in a crockpot with the remaining ingredients: sliced mushrooms, onions, salt, sugar, oregano, garlic, and tomatoes.
4. Stir to combine all ingredients.
5. Cook on high for 1 hour, then switch to low heat and cook for an additional 6-8 hours.
6. Serve over rice or fettuccini.
